# FF_DOWNLOADSKIPPED | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FF_DOWNLOADSKIPPED ](/documentation/forcefeedback/ff_downloadskipped)

-  FF_DOWNLOADSKIPPED 

Global Variable# FF_DOWNLOADSKIPPED

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FF_DOWNLOADSKIPPED: HRESULT { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ff_downloadskipped#Discussion)

The parameters of the effect were successfully updated by FFEffectSetParameters, but the effect was not downloaded because the FFEP_NODOWNLOAD flag was passed.
